creator: mason@blisses.org
text:
Openbox built from ports with default options honors monitor edges when maximizing a window. The pkg, which ought to be identical, does not.

ldd notes the following in the port but not the package:

libXcursor.so.1
libXfixes.so.3

Don't know if either of those is an issue, but my expectation was that a default port build would link the same libraries as the equivalent package.

Package from http://pkg.freebsd.org/freebsd:10:x86:64/quarterly/All/
Port built from https://svn.freebsd.org/ports/branches/2015Q4
